title: SyllabusSwap
problem_or_desire: Finding open-source creative examples for repetitive academic assignment prompts
core_concept: Searchable registry of verified academic supplemental material.
proposed_approach: A curated directory where users can submit and view links to supplemental materials for specific course modules.
prototype_scope: A simple directory site with search and submission forms. | Create a database of 3 dummy course modules; Build a submission form for links; Implement a basic search/filter interface

title: LegacyLeaf
problem_or_desire: Difficulty in contextualizing old digitized family photos with metadata
core_concept: Chronological storytelling grid for digital archives
proposed_approach: Users pin photos to a virtual timeline populated with external major historical dates as anchor points
prototype_scope: Web interface where 10 image uploads can be arranged chronologically with editable text annotations per slot

title: Event Schedule Peacekeeper
target_user: Chief of Staff to growing leadership teams
problem_or_desire: Managing individual goal priorities within restricted master organizational capacity plans.
core_concept: Constraint-optimization based scheduler prioritizing stated goal achievement rather than empty availability.
proposed_approach: The agent performs impact analysis of moving one 'critical block' by predicting potential schedule collapse based on historical meeting habits.
prototype_scope: Plugin interfacing with a public calendar API that suggests reshuffling times based on user-designated project milestones.

title: Micro-SaaS Idea Validator
problem_or_desire: Spending too much time building products that lack market interest.
core_concept: A landing page generator specifically designed for A/B testing value propositions.
proposed_approach: A web app that creates two versions of a landing page and tracks conversion rates for different feature sets.
prototype_scope: A template builder that creates two distinct landing pages and a basic analytics dashboard.

title: Collaborative Cold-Brew Barista Collective
problem_or_desire: Long transit waiting times leading to inconsistent coffee intake due to unpredictable cafe wait times
core_concept: On-transit batch-chilled hydration stations replenished based on daily train scheduling metadata
proposed_approach: Deploying self-contained cold press kiosks that receive daily batch fills tuned to anticipated traffic on train lines
prototype_scope: Deploying one prototype vending interface in a specific bus transition hub managed with dynamic inventory logic

title: SyncMyBoard
problem_or_desire: Mismatching players, times, and learning difficulty levels
core_concept: Matchmaking based on game complexity and player expertise.
proposed_approach: A platform where users list games they want to play and their own experience level.
prototype_scope: A simple match-making form. | Build a game listing form; Implement a search/filter for players; Add a simple messaging feature

title: Sales Lead Qualifier Agent
problem_or_desire: Wasted time on unqualified leads that do not fit the ideal customer profile.
core_concept: An agent that performs deep research on incoming leads by analyzing public digital footprints and company data.
proposed_approach: Automated web-scraping and data synthesis to score leads based on predefined firmographic criteria.
prototype_scope: A tool that takes a list of 20 LinkedIn profiles and returns a 'qualified' or 'unqualified' status with a one-sentence justification.

title: Mind Mapping Mycology
target_user: Project managers needing mental organizational structure
problem_or_desire: Hard-to-track complex logical connections between project silos
core_concept: An isometric management simulation where project nodes propagate resources like fungal mycelium, forcing identification of 'thin' link areas through intuitive visual obstruction.
proposed_approach: Mapping abstract work dependencies to subterranean connections; broken/weak linkages result in wilting the surface network of crops.
prototype_scope: Visualization engine displaying connections between one parent and three child entities.

title: Software Dependency Auditor
problem_or_desire: Managing security vulnerabilities in open-source dependencies across multiple microservices.
core_concept: An agent that scans dependency manifests, checks against vulnerability databases, and creates pull requests for patches.
proposed_approach: Automated version checking and testing of patches in a sandboxed environment before notifying developers.
prototype_scope: A tool that identifies one outdated dependency in a repository and generates a pull request with the updated version.

title: Personal Flavor Genome Modeler
problem_or_desire: Inability to predict which meals currently maximize palatability vs nausea
core_concept: Correlative nutrient adjustment system based on specific neuro-sensory feedback loops
proposed_approach: Delivering custom savory snacks modeled off tracked daily biometric and linguistic sentiment ratings of food quality
prototype_scope: Three day delivery set monitored by participant phone journals analyzing flavor preference patterns in one clinic community
